title: NoSignEdit
description: Removes the sign edit screen when you place a sign.
body:
# NoSignEdit
This mod allows the player to place signs or hanging signs without opening the content edit screen, it also makes only possible to edit a sign if both player hands are empty (main hand and off-hand) or you have a modifier item (honeycomb/dyes/glow ink).
## Features
- No edit sign screen for Signs and Hanging Signs on placement.
- Edit sign screen only appears when both hands are empty.
